title: FoundationAgents/OpenManus
friendlyTitle: An open-source framework for experimenting with AI agents
summary: OpenManus is a widely watched open-source agent framework that remains visible on GitHub Trending, offering a Python-heavy base for experimenting with general-purpose agent workflows.
friendlySummary: OpenManus is a popular Python project for trying general-purpose agent workflows.
whyItMatters: Developers can inspect it as a reference point for open agent architecture, task orchestration, and community patterns, even if they should still evaluate maintenance activity before adopting it in production.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for learning how agent systems are structured, though teams should check how actively it is maintained before relying on it.
